description: 멀리서 주막의 전경을 보여주며, 입구에서 손님을 기다리는 주모
visual_prompt: A wide shot of a traditional Korean Joseon tavern, thatched roof, a beautiful Korean female tavern keeper standing at the entrance, waving a wooden ladle, warm sunlight filtering through trees, 1980s film camera quality, vintage film grain.

description: 나무 테이블 위에 탁주 사발을 내려놓는 주모의 손 (클로즈업)
visual_prompt: Close-up of a Korean woman's hand placing a rough ceramic bowl of milky Takju (rice wine) on a weathered wooden table, droplets on the bowl, sunlight reflecting on the liquid, 1980s film grain, soft focus.

description: 웃으며 손님에게 인사를 건네는 주모의 얼굴
visual_prompt: Medium close-up of a beautiful Korean woman with a sly smile, wearing a simple hemp hanbok, speaking with lip movement, feminine and curvy, beads of sweat on her forehead, traditional tavern background, warm cinematic lighting, photorealistic.

description: 더운 여름날, 부채질을 하며 땀찌를 닦는 모습
visual_prompt: A Korean tavern woman in short-sleeve hemp hanbok, fanning herself with a traditional round fan, wiping sweat from her neck, curvy figure, vintage 1980s film aesthetic, soft color palette.

description: 탁주 항아리에서 사발로 술을 자작하게 따르는 장면
visual_prompt: Medium shot of a Joseon tavern woman pouring milky white rice wine from a large clay jar into a bowl, the liquid splashing slightly, simple and worn clothing, traditional kitchen background, warm sunlight.

description: 주막 구석에서 안주용 전을 부치며 뒤돌아보는 모습
visual_prompt: A Joseon woman in short-sleeve working hanbok, pan-frying Jeon (Korean pancakes) over an open fire, looking back over her shoulder with a playful gaze, feminine and curvy, light smoke, cinematic lighting.

description: 손님에게 술상을 들고 걸어오는 전신 모습
visual_prompt: Full body shot of a beautiful Joseon tavern woman carrying a small wooden table with food and wine, wearing short-sleeved hemp top and short hemp trousers, curvy feminine figure, walking across the dirt floor of the tavern, 1980s film quality.

description: 손님의 빈 사발을 확인하고 익살스런 표정을 짓는 클로즈업
visual_prompt: Extreme close-up of a beautiful Korean woman's face, winking and smiling, traditional tavern interior, vintage film grain, warm highlights on her skin, soft focus background.

description: 주막 처마 밑에서 햇빛을 피하며 잠시 쉬는 모습
visual_prompt: A Joseon woman sitting on a wooden bench under the thatched roof, leaning against a post, curvy figure, rough hemp fabric texture, soft sunlight, 1980s film aesthetic.

description: 커다란 주걱으로 국밥 솥을 젓고 있는 뒷모습
visual_prompt: Back view of a curvy Korean woman in simple hemp hanbok top, stirring a large steaming iron pot with a wooden ladle, focus on her waist and hips, steam rising, traditional kitchen setting, photorealistic.

description: 손님과 웃으며 대화를 나누는 즐거운 표정
visual_prompt: Medium shot of a Joseon woman laughing heartily, hand over her mouth, expressive eyes, short-sleeve summer hanbok, feminine silhouette, warm tavern lighting, vintage 1980s film grain.

description: 바닥에 떨어진 젓가락을 줍기 위해 몸을 숙이는 장면
visual_prompt: A Joseon tavern woman bending over to pick up a wooden chopstick from the dirt floor, emphasis on her curvy feminine figure, wearing simple hemp working clothes, warm afternoon sun, cinematic composition.

description: 나무 기둥에 기대어 멀리 서 있는 손님을 쳐다보는 모습
visual_prompt: A beautiful Korean woman leaning against a thick wooden pillar, looking into the distance with a longing expression, shabby but clean hemp hanbok, vintage film wash, soft focus.

description: 주방에서 칼질을 하며 집중하고 있는 옆모습
visual_prompt: Side profile of a Joseon woman chopping vegetables on a wooden block, focused gaze, short-sleeved top showing her arms, curves evident, 1980s film stock look, warm light.

description: 술 취한 손님에게 술 그만 마시라고 손짓하는 모습
visual_prompt: Medium shot of a tavern woman wagging her finger with a stern but friendly face, curvy figure in hemp outfit, traditional interior with straw mats, vintage film grain, soft lighting.

description: 주막 마당에 널린 빨래 사이로 걸어 나오는 장면
visual_prompt: A Joseon woman walking through rows of white laundry hanging to dry, flickering sunlight and shadows, curvy figure, summer hanbok, cinematic 1980s movie aesthetic.

description: 사발에 남은 탁주 찌꺼기를 흔들어 버리는 동작
visual_prompt: Close-up shot of a woman's hands swirling a ceramic bowl and tossing out dregs, liquid flying in the air, sunset light hitting the spray, 1980s film quality.

description: 머리를 다시 가다듬으며 비녀를 꽂는 주모
visual_prompt: Medium shot of a beautiful Joseon woman fixing her hair bun, arms raised showing her profile, feminine and curvy, simple hemp hanbok, traditional background, warm cinematic glow.

description: 주막 문을 닫으며 마지막 손님을 배웅하는 뒷모습
visual_prompt: Full body back view of a curvy tavern woman waving goodbye to someone in the twilight, glowing tavern lamps, hemp fabric texture, soft focus, vintage 1980s film look.

description: 주막 안에서 촛불을 끄기 전 미소 짓는 얼굴
visual_prompt: Close-up of a beautiful Joseon woman's face illuminated by a single candle, soft smile, expressive eyes, warm shadows, vintage film grain, photorealistic, cinematic finale.
